title: Fix beads compatibility parent-child validation
description: Beads compatibility mode fails when Beads data includes parent-child links that do not match Taskulus hierarchy (example error: invalid parent-child relationship: 'story' cannot have child 'event'). Running list/ready/show in beads compatibility raises InvalidHierarchyError during record conversion. Compatibility mode should tolerate or map Beads parent-child relationships without failing.
creator: ryan.porter
